title: Fix transcript_2/3/4, TH computations, context builders, AAD, and update tests for Python interop
description: Implement missing transcript_* helpers, replace manual CBOR builders for TH_2/3/4 (~782,855,1302), update build_context_*, signature structures, AAD for AEAD to match edhoc.py exactly. Update rfc9529 test vectors and add interop test. Consolidate duplicated code in process_message_2/3.
